title: Bridge Essay: Transcendental meditation for veterans with post-traumatic stress disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Transcendental meditation for veterans with post-traumatic stress disorder.**. Psychol Trauma.. PMID: 30024219. DOI: 10.1037/tra0000346. OBJECTIVE: Transcendental Meditation (TM) is amental technique using amantra to facilitate meditation. TM has apotential for treating symptoms of posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), but its clinical efficacy remains to be clarified. This pilot study evaluated the acceptability, preliminary effectiveness, and neurophysiology of TM for veterans with PTSD.
